tool_args.label: Bronx Borough President Ruben Diaz, Jr.

payload.description: Proposed SBS project along Webster Avenue in the Bronx. First Community Advisory Committee meeting held February 6, 2012.
Corridor in the Bronx being studied for Select Bus Service. Runs through areas including Fordham Road, Gun Hill Road, and E. 180th Street.
Bus route along Webster Avenue. Cut at Gun Hill Road. Proposed for extension and SBS conversion.

issues: route target_record_id route_webster-ave-sbs implies service_variant "sbs" but payload implies "local"; submit a separate route record or remove the contradictory variant instead of merging service variants

payload.description: Bx12 Select Bus Service on Fordham Road. Referenced as an example of SBS results.
First Community Advisory Committee (CAC) meeting for the Webster Avenue Select Bus Service (SBS) project at Lincoln Hospital in the Bronx.
Local bus route along Webster Avenue. Cut at Gun Hill Road at the time of this meeting.
Redevelopment adding 250,000 square feet of office space and a proposed charter school. Includes a 'bus only' street along 3rd Avenue between E 189th Street and Fordham Road.
Existing SBS on Fordham Road (Bx12 SBS). Referenced as comparison: designed to fit existing conditions, whereas Webster Avenue SBS addresses future potential.

payload.claim_text: Webster Avenue has lost many parking spots over the last fifteen years.
payload.subject: Webster Avenue

payload.claim_text: The new Fordham Plaza Redevelopment will add 250,000 square feet of office space and a proposed charter school.
payload.subject: Fordham Plaza Redevelopment

payload.claim_text: Time savings come from a combination of bus lanes, traffic signal priority and off-board fare collection.
payload.subject: Select Bus Service
payload.description: Mr. Orosz responded that time savings come from a combination of bus lanes, traffic signal priority and off-board fare collection.

payload.claim_text: A potential solution may be to implement an offset bus lane, so that bus lanes do not consume the valuable curbspace.
payload.subject: Webster Avenue SBS
payload.description: Conceptual offset bus lane suggestion to preserve curb space for deliveries and parking.

tool_args.label: Webster Avenue congestion near Cross Bronx

payload.claim_text: Webster Avenue, in the vicinity of E. 180th Street, often becomes backed up, especially during rush hour, due to congestion caused by traffic entering and exiting the Cross Bronx Expressway.
payload.subject: Webster Avenue
payload.location: Webster Avenue near E. 180th Street, Bronx

location_normalized.raw_text: Webster Avenue near E. 180th Street, Bronx

tool_args.label: Bx41 cut at Gun Hill Road

payload.claim_text: Since the Bx41 bus route was cut at Gun Hill Road, it is difficult to get to places north of there. An extension of the Bx41 should be considered to better accommodate bus riders.
payload.subject: Bx41 bus route

warnings: claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

tool_args.label: Webster Avenue wide enough for bus lane

payload.claim_text: Webster Avenue is indeed wide enough to accommodate a bus lane.
payload.subject: Webster Avenue
payload.description: Mr. Orosz responded that Webster Avenue is indeed wide enough to accommodate a bus lane.

payload.claim_text: The Fordham Plaza redesign will establish a 'bus only' street along 3rd Avenue between E 189th Street and Fordham Road to make for better bus circulation in the area.
payload.subject: Fordham Plaza redesign
payload.location: 3rd Avenue between E 189th Street and Fordham Road, Bronx

location_normalized.raw_text: 3rd Avenue between E 189th Street and Fordham Road, Bronx

payload.claim_text: In the vicinity of Gun Hill Road and Webster Avenue, there will be a large influx of pedestrians and pedestrian safety needs to be addressed.
payload.subject: Gun Hill Road and Webster Avenue
payload.location: Gun Hill Road and Webster Avenue, Bronx

location_normalized.raw_text: Gun Hill Road and Webster Avenue, Bronx

tool_args.label: New K-8 school at 205th and Webster

payload.claim_text: At 205th Street and Webster Avenue in Bedford Park, a new K-8 school is being built, which will be in addition to two existing schools in the area.
payload.subject: 205th Street and Webster Avenue
payload.location: 205th Street and Webster Avenue, Bedford Park, Bronx

location_normalized.raw_text: 205th Street and Webster Avenue, Bedford Park, Bronx

payload.claim_text: A unified fare collection for all modes of transportation was suggested, including commuter rail, making it easier for people to quickly board and pay.
payload.subject: fare collection

payload.claim_text: Since there are so many elements to consider in data collection, a possible joint-verification exercise between the community and different agencies would be beneficial to the study.
payload.subject: data collection
payload.description: Suggestion for joint-verification exercise between community and agencies for the Webster Avenue SBS study.
Represented by Carmen E. Arroyo

tool_args.label: Webster Avenue SBS uses Webster Avenue corridor

payload.description: Webster Avenue SBS project is planned for the Webster Avenue corridor in the Bronx.

tool_args.label: Webster Avenue SBS serves Bx41 corridor

payload.description: The Bx41 local route operates along Webster Avenue and is the route being studied for SBS conversion.

tool_args.label: Webster Avenue SBS has CAC Meeting #1

payload.description: First Community Advisory Committee meeting for the Webster Avenue SBS project.
The Bx41 bus route operates along Webster Avenue.

tool_args.label: Webster Avenue SBS implemented by NYCDOT and NYCT

payload.description: NYCDOT is lead agency for the Webster Avenue SBS study.

tool_args.label: Webster Avenue SBS implemented by NYCT

payload.description: MTA New York City Transit co-hosted the first CAC meeting for the Webster Avenue SBS project.

tool_args.label: Webster Avenue SBS CAC co-hosted by Borough President Diaz

payload.description: The meeting was co-hosted by Bronx Borough President Ruben Diaz, Jr.

tool_args.label: CAC Meeting organized by NYCDOT and NYCT

payload.description: NYCDOT and NYCT held the first CAC meeting.

tool_args.label: Fordham SBS referenced as comparison for Webster SBS

payload.description: Fordham SBS was designed to fit existing conditions, whereas Webster Avenue SBS will need to address transportation needs based on the future potential of the corridor.

tool_args.label: Fordham Plaza Redevelopment related to Webster SBS study

payload.description: Fordham Plaza Redevelopment was discussed as context for parking needs and includes a bus-only street that should be considered as part of the Webster SBS study.
